title: LP PVP
description: A lightweight modpack focused on PVP. Built for Hoplite, but will work well with other PVP servers, or survival-related playing.
body:
LP PVP or Lite Paragon PVP, is a modpack meant for PVP within newer versions of Minecraft. Similar to some of the popular clients, the mods in the pack are highly customizable to your liking. Different HUD advancements, optimizations, quality of life, and extra accessories have been added to add to the experience. LP PVP attempts to differ from most clients by, lowering mod quantities, and to try and make a simple but effective modpack for all PVP needs.

The modpack includes a few texture packs that are quite popular and are highly known or at least the iterations of them have been. 
(I do not own any of the said texture packs that are present)

Do give some support to the mod developers who made these mods as without them this modpack wouldn't exist.

Some of the external mods from Modrinth that have been added are all within distribution rules, and can be found at:

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/arrows-info

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cleanview-fabric

https://github.com/TheMrEngMan/statuseffecttimer/releases/tag/1.1.1-1.20.1


DISCLAIMER:

Any use of the mods that defy rules stated by servers is ill-advised. Do use, add, and customize mods within the modpack at your own risk. Read the rules of the server before using possibly unallowed mods and settings.
